column1: I (not to know) what to give my brother for his birthday.
I (to finish) my homework by seven o’clock.
"Jack may go to the party with Alice", said Hazel. Hazel said Jack _____ to the party with Alice.
... you ... (to see) any good movies recently?
He __________ a book the whole evening yesterday.
Kate, _____ sister I used to share a house with, has gone to work in Australia.
I never do anything until I have checked everything ________
I (to wait) for you a long time.
There was ... beautiful flower in this ... vase yesterday.
If it (to rain), we will have to stay at home.
